item.title: Mt. Gox trustee moves 10,422 BTC ($739M) from cold wallets ahead of creditor repayment deadline
Spot bitcoin ETFs record $3.4B outflow day as bitcoin falls below $70K
MoneyGram launches stablecoin on Stellar network, joining the cross-border digital dollar push
Robinhood enters Canadian market via $180M acquisition of crypto platform WonderFi
MicroStrategy reports bitcoin sale amid broader selloff that pushed BTC below $70,000
Grayscale files updated HYPE ETF prospectus with competitive fee structure
